it-support.title: IT Support Specialist
it-support.description: Provide Tier 1/2 desktop support in a Windows and Active Directory environment. Manage service tickets in ServiceNow. Configure laptops, printers, and VPN access for 500+ employees. Strong troubleshooting and communication skills required.

it-support.title: Helpdesk Analyst
it-support.description: Support internal employees across macOS and Windows. ITIL-based ticket management. Office 365 administration, hardware provisioning, onboarding support. Strong customer service orientation required.

it-support.title: Technical Support Analyst
it-support.description: Government IT support role. Reliability security clearance required. Windows 10/11 environments, VPN troubleshooting, remote support tools. Bilingual (English/French) an asset.

admin.title: Administrative Assistant
admin.description: Manage executive calendars, draft correspondence, coordinate meetings and travel. Advanced MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook). Experience in federal government an asset.

admin.title: Office Coordinator
admin.description: Coordinate day-to-day office operations, manage supplies and vendors, support leadership team. Strong organizational and interpersonal skills. Non-profit experience an asset.

admin.title: Operations Assistant
admin.description: Support operations team with data entry, scheduling, and stakeholder communication. Experience with GCMS or similar government systems preferred. Bilingualism strongly preferred.

retail.title: Apple Specialist
retail.description: Help customers explore and buy Apple products. Passion for technology and customer education. No prior Apple experience required — training provided. Full-time and part-time available. Competitive benefits.

retail.title: Mobile Advisor
retail.description: Sell mobile devices and wireless plans. Meet monthly sales targets. Strong knowledge of Android and iOS ecosystem. Prior wireless retail experience preferred.

retail.title: Consumer Electronics Specialist
retail.description: Assist customers with electronics purchases. Demonstrate TVs, laptops, cameras, and smart home devices. Meet sales targets. Previous retail or electronics experience required.
